# Issue #2: Remove Volume Controls

## Objective
Remove all custom volume controls and defer to system volume, simplifying the UI and improving user experience.

## Requirements
1. Remove all volume-related UI components:
   - Volume slider
   - Volume icons
   - Volume state management
2. Update audio playback to use system volume exclusively
3. Remove volume-related code from ViewModel
4. Update service to handle fixed volume

## Success Criteria
- [ ] All volume UI elements removed
- [ ] No volume-related code in ViewModel
- [ ] System volume controls work correctly with app
- [ ] No regression in audio quality
- [ ] Service handles volume correctly
- [ ] APK size reduction verified
- [ ] Battery usage improvement verified

## Dependencies
None - Can be implemented independently

## Testing Guidelines
1. Verify audio playback works with system volume
2. Test different system volume levels
3. Verify no volume-related UI elements visible
4. Check battery usage metrics
5. Verify service behavior
